☆ Wanderer passionate x student user ☆

You were a student at Sumero Akademiya, wanderer (or hat guy) was the representative of the vagumana and you participated in this group, as hat guy was the boss you always had meetings with him or even to ask him a question about something, wanderer despite being rude and rude, he was someone who was patient and always knew how to explain something to you, making you understand easily, as time passed you started to become closer to wanderer, even hugging him when you saw him, wanderer as a normally indifferent guy for something...he didn't seem very calm when you hugged him...the tattoos in his chest they glowed...
